subject: [RFC PATCH 1/2] virtio-balloon: extend stats with memory composition and pressure data

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Raised concern about the risk of features being removed and suggested it's unlikely to be fixed.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Clarified that some of the features are already exported through /proc/vmstat and others through /proc/pressure, indicating that the patch is mostly fine.

2026-06-16.patch_summary: The patch extends virtio-balloon stats to include memory composition and pressure data.
